rcdmTypes.rationale: Shift axis (-0.1 z) and regularity (0.1 z) are strong while pressure is relatively quieter, matching an oscillating phase-oriented day.
Regularity (-8.11 z) and coherence (-4.23 z) are weak, so the cluster reads as low-confidence and decision-minimizing.
Pressure axis (1 z) clearly exceeds shift axis (0.45 z), so pressure cues dominate more than directional phase work.
Pressure axis (0.69 z) clearly exceeds shift axis (0.08 z), so pressure cues dominate more than directional phase work.

analysis.silhouetteInterpretation: Highest silhouette occurs at k=2 (0.763567). Primary reporting remains fixed at k=4 per spec.

sailorDecisionTree: lullPeakSpread <= 0.461 AND windRange <= 0.229 => Cluster 0 (100% purity, n=54)
lullPeakSpread > 0.461 AND rollingShiftFrequency <= 0.123 => Cluster 3 (100% purity, n=28)
